prompt: clean polished vector logo, faithful recreation of a child's monogram. EXACT structure from left to right: letter A (two diagonal lines meeting at top with a crossbar). Connected directly to the A is a U shape. INSIDE the U are two short vertical lines that are EYES. Hanging out the BOTTOM of the U curve is a small wavy squiggle line which is a TONGUE sticking out, making the U look like a silly face sticking its tongue out 😜. Connected to the right side of the U is the letter P. The whole thing reads AUP as one continuous connected mark. The hidden face in the U has: two line eyes inside, the U curve is the head shape, and a playful tongue dangles from the bottom. Below in childlike handwriting: avie's utility pouches. Black bold marker strokes on white background. Clean refined version of a 7 year old's marker art. Simple. Sticker ready. Do NOT add anything extra.
